titles.title: I Stop and Think for a While

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stop and think for a while I come to think of my iniquities and faults And it hurts me so much to see That I don't please You LORD And I wonder why do You suffer that A wretch like me should live.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why is it Lord? Who am I that You can do these things for me That you stooped down so much in Calvary?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's Your Love, Your everlasting love that keeps me Your tender hands that hold me all the way It's Your grace that sustains me It's Your mercy that rewrites my life That I may go into perfection For that day you have planned in Your mind Before this world was formed O I stand in awe, when I stop and think for a while

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I stop and think for a while I ask why do you love me in my weaknesses There are people whose well than me Who look pleasing to You And I wonder why I am accepted in The Beloved who died for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It's Your Love, Your everlasting love that keeps me Your tender hands that hold me all the way It's Your grace that sustains me It's Your mercy that rewrites my life That I may go into perfection For that day you have planned in Your mind Before this world was formed O I stand in awe, when I stop and think for a while

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now I know, Now I know I am a part of You I believe, I believe For what You've done in Calvary
